title: Protocol for "Use of Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Large Language Models in Enhancing Scientific Peer Review and Grant Evaluation: A Scoping Review"
author: White, Brianna M.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This protocol outlines a scoping review of artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), and large language model (LLM) applications in the scientific peer review process for both scholarly publications and grant evaluation. We define eligibility criteria using the Population‑Concept‑Context (PCC) framework and describe our comprehensive search strategy across PubMed, Embase, Web of Science, IEEE Xplore, arXiv, and Google Scholar. We also document our screening and data‑charting procedures, and include full search strings and the data extraction codebook as supplementary material to ensure full transparency.
steps_raw: This protocol outlines a scoping review of artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), and large language model (LLM) applications in the scientific peer review process for both scholarly publications and grant evaluation. We also document our screening and data‑charting procedures, and include full search strings and the data extraction codebook as supplementary material to ensure full transparency.
